title: SecretValue: no Clone/Debug/Display/Serialize is correct and must be defended
description: SecretValue deliberately omits Clone, Debug, Display, Serialize, and Deserialize. Contributors will suggest adding these for 'ergonomics' or 'testing convenience.' Resist: each one creates a path to log or serialize secret bytes. The as_bytes() method is the intentional escape hatch for tests. The zeroize-on-drop property is also essential — Clone would create untracked copies. This design should survive any PR that requests derive(Debug) or derive(Clone).
